name: example.echo_tool
description: Reference plugin that exposes a deterministic echo-style tool capability.

capabilities.name: tool.echo
capabilities.description: Return a deterministic echo payload for SDK smoke tests.

permissions.name: tool.execute
permissions.reason: Required to expose the example echo tool through the plugin contract.

permissions.name: metrics.read
permissions.reason: Used by host runtimes to show example plugin execution metrics.
